title: Luscious Velvety Polish Turkey Ham Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting Polish dish featuring turkey ham and render-fat, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large skillet, heat the render-fat over medium heat
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown
In a large bowl, combine the diced turkey ham, cooked onions and mushrooms, grated carrots, and sliced potatoes
In a separate bowl, whisk together the vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper
Pour the broth mixture over the turkey ham mixture and stir until everything is well combined
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil
Bake for 45 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes
